programmes.show_description: This time the Goggleboxers watch Married at First Sight Australia, The Summit, LOL: Last One Laughing UK, Boarders, I Swear, Wheel of Fortune and Melania.
(2023) Brandon Cronenberg's intense psychological horror with Alexander Skarsgård and Mia Goth. When a rich tourist accidentally kills someone, he gets cloned to avoid the death penalty.
...Experiment: Tom and Kirsty check in to fulfil Tom's fantasy of experimenting with another man. Natalie and Tom explore a threesome, but will insecurities get in the way?
Vicky and Carl have brought their retirement plans forward and are now ready to move to Spain. Jean Johansson shows them what their £70k can buy on the southern Costa Blanca.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Merseyside. Fun-loving oil and gas co-ordinator Danielle Greenwood hopes to impress her guests with her down-to-earth menu and warm and welcoming style of hosting. (Ep1/5)
Merseyside. Pastoral care manager Steven Booth names each of his courses after songs by his favourite singer, Tina Turner. But tensions rise when one guest puts her foot in it. (Ep2/5)
Merseyside. Glamorous PR professional Jade Chantelle places her bets on a casino-themed evening featuring a high-class menu, lashings of champagne and a game of roulette. (Ep3/5)
Merseyside. Primary school teacher Anna Senior plans a fairy-tale evening, featuring a Mad Hatter's soup and a special pork dish cooked three ways. (Ep4/5)
Merseyside. Michael Bublé impersonator Jamie Somers hosts the final night. Can Jamie and Jade overcome their differences? (Ep5/5)
In the West Country, Kirstein hosts a Greek evening of hearty home cooking with a dash of tea towel tossing and terrific togas. Will her Grecian get-together appease her guests? (Ep1/5)
In the West Country, Peppe hosts an authentic Italian night, but one guest doesn't like Italian food! Will his Neapolitan nosh impress, or will hamster high jinks hamper things? (Ep2/5)
In the West Country, barber Natalia hopes that her 90s night will be a cut above the rest. But with controversial comments and nitpicking, will it be more disaster than nostalgia? (Ep3/5)
In the West Country, Richard puts on some top-notch British bistro fare, but his tagliatelle leaves one guest tongue-tied. Will it be a sophisticated soiree or dull as dishwater? (Ep4/5)
The new run continues. In the West Country, spiritualist Jo plans a divine dinner of international fare. But will pizza profanities and ghostly goings-on ruin her chances? (Ep5/5)
Kazal and Eleena are ditching Dubai and moving back home to Solihull to be close to family. Can they overcome building blunders to create the ultimate hosting hub?
Kirstie and Phil visit west London, where property is expensive and sells fast. They help newly-weds Keon and Zoe in Shepherd's Bush, and Paul and Carolyn in Richmond.

programmes.show_name: A Place in the Sun: What...
programmes.show_description: ...Happened Next?: On Malta, we see Chris' new kitchen from Italy no less! On the Costa Blanca, we revisit Jan and Bill at Casa Milly, that they named in honour of Bill's mum.

programmes.show_name: A Place in the Sun: What...
programmes.show_description: ...Happened Next?: Jasmine Harman sees how Gary and Lynn are getting on in Haute-Vienne. And are Lorna and Brian's Almería villa and its pool still making a splash?
Claire and Simon are starting a new adventure in Nerja in Spain. Will any of Craig Rowe's options for their £230k get their hearts racing enough to put in an offer?
Nikki and Gordon want a home with great views on the Maltese island of Gozo. Ben Hillman shows them what their £350k can buy. Has he found the Mediterranean dream?

programmes.show_name: Help! I Bought It at Auction...
programmes.show_description: ...with Sarah Beeny: Brave auction buyers convert derelict digs into diamond homes. Alison and Michael take on a pitfall palace. Jules and Al tackle a creaky Cornwall B&B. (Ep1)
Epic rags-to-riches drama with Brenda Blethyn and Jessica Reynolds. Emma's tempted by romance again for the first time since Edwin. Adele's return to Fairley threatens everything. (Ep5/8)
Epic rags-to-riches drama with Brenda Blethyn and Jessica Reynolds. Emma prepares the perfect family Christmas, but her obsession with work and revenge brings danger to her door. (Ep6/8)
A pedestrian is rushed to A&E with multiple life-threatening injuries after a hit-and-run. An acrobat has a damaged wrist. And a 93-year-old has a broken leg.
The Goggleboxers settle in for Celebrity Bake Off, The Dog House, Saturday Night Live UK, Britain's Got Talent, Celebrity Sabotage, BBC News on Easter eggs and more.
(2021) Wes Anderson's star-encrusted tribute to the New Yorker magazine covers the final edition of a chaotic fictional publication, following the death of its editor - Bill Murray.
Jessica Fostekew and Joe Lycett enjoy a Canarian caper, as they trike through Lanzarote's lunar landscape, sample volcanic vino and cactus croquettes, and tour the lava tunnels.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Natalie Palmer flies solo as she hosts at The Oak pub and B&B in Charing, Kent. Her guests admire her work ethic, but they're not blown away by the extractor fans.
Dennis Gilligan hosts at The White Lady in Worstead, Norfolk. Will his rivals encounter the legendary ghostly guest?
Former couple Katherine and Stewart offer an alternative spiritual experience at Cranleigh House B&B in Devon. But Dennis and Gary struggle to keep a straight face during a hilltop healing.
The last visit is to Paignton in Devon, where Mike and Denise are the new kids on the block, having only opened the doors to their B&B, Beaches, a few weeks earlier.
It's the final day of the competition and tensions run high as the B&Bers meet for the final time to air their grievances, before the payments are revealed and the winner is announced.
Shauna and Sam's Lancashire glampsite boasts a wealth of top-end facilities, including hot tubs, cinema screens and pizza ovens. Is it enough to see them victorious?
At luxury self-catering digs in Bradford, the B&Bers aren't sure that flat-pack furniture quite equates to the promised opulence.
At a quirky hotel in the centre of York that features a dungeon room full of chains, the B&Bers indulge in some BDSM: bellyaching, disagreeing, stain-hunting and moaning.
Martial arts expert Dan hosts the week's final visit in Southport, where he aims to please with his no-nonsense approach to a classic seaside getaway.
Allegations of game playing are rife on payment day, with one pair vastly underpaying everyone. You could cut the tension with a best-value-B&B plaque!

programmes.show_name: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programmes.show_description: In Herefordshire, Simon O'Brien and Max McMurdo meet George, a collector for over 70 years. Max finds a crate of vintage motor oil bottles that could be worth a small fortune.

programmes.show_name: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programmes.show_description: In the Devon countryside, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien meet collectors Derek and Daphne. Henry finds a very rare tractor, while Simon discovers a Raleigh Shopper bike.

programmes.show_name: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programmes.show_description: Simon O'Brien and Max McMurdo meet retired haulier Jim in Worcestershire. Max wants to transform old air tanks into a sports car, while Simon turns some barrels into a bar bench.
Angie and Alan want to fulfil their dream of buying their very first property together on Spain's beautiful Orihuela Costa. Can Jasmine Harman find the perfect place for their £60k?
Bev and Errol can't wait to buy a Spanish holiday home in Mar Menor. Jasmine Harman shows them what their £65k can buy.
Nat and Dave are ready to buy a holiday home on Lanzarote, a place they visit twice a year. Jean tries to find their perfect property on the island they love so much.
Corina and Honey the cavapoo get off to a shaky start, but Honey has a trick or two that might just turn things around. And is Ruby the perfect teammate for football-mad Josh?
The Goggleboxers settle in for Celebrity Bake Off, The Dog House, Saturday Night Live UK, Britain's Got Talent, Celebrity Sabotage, BBC News on Easter eggs and more.
(2022) Sci-fi disaster with Halle Berry. A NASA bigwig, a disgraced astronaut and a conspiracy theorist are all that stand between the Earth and a plummeting Moon. But are aliens involved?
